title: cooperia drummondiana var. chlorosolen
intro: Cooperia drummondiana var. chlorosolen, also known as yellow green cooperia, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family. It is a climbing or twining herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its roots, which are used to treat various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. In herbal medicine, the roots of Cooperia drummondiana var. chlorosolen are often prepared as a tea or infused in oil to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
